x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Burn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where points or rewards are used to obtain goods, services, or cash equivalents.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial Burn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where only a portion of the accumulated balance is consumed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Full Burn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where the entire available balance is consumed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Conversion Burn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where rewards or points are converted into monetary value or account credit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Payment Burn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where rewards or credits are used to pay fees or charges.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Reversal Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that reverses a previous burn, restoring the consumed value.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies the burned amount due to corrections or recalculations.
